description: Aivia session detection and entity resistance

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -f "$HOME/aivia/.config/cache/session.json" ]; then phase=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open(\"$HOME/aivia/.config/cache/session.json\")).get(\"phase\",0))" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$phase" -gt 0 ] && [ "$phase" -lt 6 ]; then echo "[aivia] Game in progress (phase $phase). Resume with /aivia:play"; fi; fi'
